news.summary: A company is commemorating a milestone by offering special deals for Npower® members in Lakewood, Colorado. On May 14, 2025, Natural Grocers® the largest family-operated natural and organic grocery store in the country, marked the 10-year anniversary of its Wheat Ridge, Colorado store.
news.headline: Natural Grocers in Wheat Ridge, CO, celebrates 10th anniversary with special offers for {N}power® members from May 16-18, 2025.

news.summary: Former President Donald Trump recently announced that the United States is currently exploring the possibility of normalizing relations with Syria. This development comes amid continuing discussions regarding diplomatic ties with the country. Trump's statement, made on 05/14, highlights the potential shift in the US stance towards Syria. The move is significant as it marks a potential policy reversal, with implications for both countries' foreign relations.
news.headline: Trump hints at US considering mending ties with Syria, reported on Bloomberg The Pulse on 05/14.
RFK Jr.'s proposal to ban food dye is improbable due to lack of support and potential economic impact.

news.summary: The latest data shows a rise in COVID-19 cases, with over 10,000 new infections reported in the past 24 hours. The total number of confirmed cases has now reached 150,000, with more than 90,000 active cases currently being monitored. The death toll also saw an increase, with 150 new fatalities bringing the total number of deaths to 2,500. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and limit social interactions to curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Small businesses urged to reassess tariffs after truce with China, stay mindful of costs.
Investors are increasingly favoring small caps and other underperforming stocks, driving gains on Wall Street.

news.summary: Former President Donald Trump recently revealed that the United States is currently considering the possibility of normalizing diplomatic relations with Syria. This announcement was made on May 14th during an interview with Bloomberg's program, The Pulse. Trump did not provide specific details about the potential normalization process, but mentioned that discussions were ongoing between the two countries. The news has sparked curiosity and speculation as to the implications and potential outcomes of such a decision.
news.headline: Trump considering improving ties with Syria per Bloomberg The Pulse 05/14 without mentioning the source: "Trump considers improving US-Syria relations, Bloomberg The Pulse 05/14"

news.summary: On Wednesday morning, major cryptocurrencies saw a slight increase in prices, with Bitcoin maintaining its position while altcoins like Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin, and Solana experienced upward momentum. The current prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $103,791.51 (+0.3%), Ethereum at $2,599.49 (+4.8%), Solana at $180.26 (+3.6%), XRP at $2.61 (+1.95%), Dogecoin at $0.2362 (+3.6%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00001601 (+2.6%). Statistical data from IntoTheBlock reveals a 9% and 10.7% increase in large transaction volumes for Bitcoin and Ethereum, respectively, within a day. Daily active addresses in BTC and ETH also surged by 10.7% and 3.7%, respectively. Coinglass reported that $411.97 million worth of liquidations occurred, affecting 139,073 traders in the last 24 hours. Crypto trader Jelle remains optimistic about Bitcoin's future, anticipating new all-time highs. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Cryptocurrencies up: Bitcoin stable, Ethereum up 4.8%, Solana up 3.6%, XRP up 1.95%, Dogecoin up 3.6%. Bitcoin transactions rose by 9%, Ethereum by 10.7%. 139,073 traders liquidated $411.97 million in 24 hours. Forecasts point to new all-time highs for Bitcoin.
TRUMP DISEMBARKS AIR FORCE ONE IN DOHA

news.summary: In Hangzhou, China on May 14, 2025, the energy industry is experiencing a shift towards digitalization, increasing the demand for strong cybersecurity measures. SolaX Power, a prominent provider of clean energy solutions, is leading the way in addressing this issue by unveiling its latest innovation…
news.headline: SolaX Power introduces cybersecurity measures for clean energy compliance with NIS2 Directive. Important date: May 14, 2025.

news.summary: Endava plc (NYSE: DAVA) released its Q3 FY2025 results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The technology-driven business transformation group reported facing a challenging business environment as the industry evolves rapidly. Despite this, they noted that clients' interest in innovation remains high. Endava emphasized their AI-native approach that combines advanced technology with industry expertise. The company did not disclose specific financial figures but expressed optimism for the future amid ongoing market changes.
news.headline: Endava plc (NYSE: DAVA) reports Q3 FY2025 results with challenging environment, strong client innovation.

news.summary: In Montevideo, Uruguay, Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) announced its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2025. As the largest restaurant chain in Latin America and the Caribbean, and the world's largest independent McDonald's franchisee, the Company reported consolidated revenues of $1.1 billion for the three months ending March 31, 2025. Despite significant currency depreciations in the regions where it operates, revenues remained relatively flat compared to the previous year in US dollars.
news.headline: Arcos Dorados reports Q1 2025 financial results: $1.1 billion in revenue, flat YoY. (Character count: 79)

news.summary: Bitcoin miners have shifted from selling to hodling, as data suggests their wallet balances have increased by 2,708 BTC (0.15%) over the past month, reaching 1,797,330 BTC by May 13. This marks a reversal in behavior from a selling streak since late 2023. The change is seen as extremely bullish for Bitcoin, with optimism over the BTC price trajectory. Hash Ribbons data, which tracks miner behavior, has signaled good times for miners and BTC price strength, with a recent "buy" signal potentially leading to further price increases. The article advises that all investment decisions should be made after conducting thorough research due to investment risks.
news.headline: Bitcoin miners cease selling as BTC surges 20% post hash ribbon ‘buy’ signal, with miner wallets up by 2,700 BTC. Trading bullish for BTC.

news.summary: Local Bounti Corporation (NYSE: LOCL) from HAMILTON, Mont., disclosed a noteworthy achievement of a 38% year-over-year revenue growth. This progress signifies a positive trajectory towards achieving a profitable Adjusted EBITDA in the third quarter of 2025. The company is strategically focusing on enhancing its distribution channels, improving yield rates, and exercising prudent cost management to reach this financial milestone.
news.headline: Local Bounti reports 38% revenue growth YoY and targets positive adjusted EBITDA in Q3 2025, focusing on distribution and cost management.

news.summary: A highly experienced individual with a background in public safety, national security, and critical infrastructure protection has joined Draganfly to enhance the company's public safety objectives. This veteran leader brings expertise in strategy, operations, and innovation to advance Draganfly's mission in public safety.
news.headline: Peter Lambrinakos joins Draganfly’s advisory board, brings expertise in public safety, national security, and infrastructure.

news.summary: In ROSH-HA`AYIN, Israel, on May 14, 2025, Kornit Digital Ltd. ("Kornit" or "the Company") (Nasdaq: KRNT) revealed its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. Kornit, a prominent figure in sustainable, on-demand digital fashion and textile production technologies, shared its quarterly results without specifically mentioning them.
news.headline: Kornit Digital, a leader in digital fashion tech, reports Q1 results for 2025. Nasdaq: KRNT.

news.summary: The Oxylanthanum carbonate (OLC) New Drug Application (NDA) is currently being reviewed by the FDA for the treatment of hyperphosphatemia in chronic kidney disease patients undergoing dialysis. The Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA) target action date for this review is set for June 28, 2025. In anticipation of the potential approval, commercial planning is underway for a targeted commercial launch expected to take place in late 2025.
news.headline: Unicycive Therapeutics reports Q1 2025 financials; Oxylanthanum carbonate NDA for hyperphosphatemia awaiting FDA decision by Jun 28, 2025, planned commercial launch in late 2025.

news.summary: Coppernico Metals Inc. is sharing the final assay findings from the Phase 1 drill initiative conducted at the Sombrero Project in Peru by its subsidiary, Sombrero Minerales SAC. The program involved 8,232.9m of diamond drilling across 20 holes aiming to assess significant geophysical and geochemical anomalies in the Ccascabamba target area. The outcomes reveal extensive copper-gold mineralization, aligning with the skarn-porphyry geological model and reinforcing the vast potential of the Sombrero Project at a district level. Currently, drilling operations are halted temporarily while the company seeks expanded permits to access priority areas.
news.headline: Coppernico Metals discovers large copper skarn system at Sombrero in Peru, with Phase 1 program drilling 8,232.9m over 20 holes confirming copper-gold mineralization. Exploration temporarily paused for expanded permits.

news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index displayed a positive shift in market sentiment, maintaining its position in the "Greed" zone on Tuesday. U.S. stocks had a mixed performance, with the Nasdaq Composite surging by approximately 300 points during trading. A 90-day trade truce was agreed upon by the U.S. and China, leading to the reduction of triple-digit tariffs starting May 14. In April, the Consumer Price Index indicated a slowdown, meeting or falling below expectations for both headline and core readings. This alleviated concerns regarding the impact of Trump's proposed trade tariffs on inflation. NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA) saw a notable increase of around 5.6% in its shares on Tuesday following the announcement of a strategic partnership. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Nasdaq up by 300 points on Nvidia boost, market sentiment improves with Fear & Greed Index in 'Greed' zone.

news.summary: U.S. stock futures are up slightly this morning. Some stocks to watch include Sony Group Corporation (NYSE: SONY) which reported quarterly earnings of 21 cents per share on $17.25 billion in sales. Sony shares dropped by 0.6% to $24.40 in after-hours trading. American Eagle Outfitters Inc (NYSE: AEO) released preliminary first-quarter results and removed its full-year guidance. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Stocks to watch include Sony Group Corporation (NYSE: SONY) earning 21 cents per share on sales of $17.25 billion. American Eagle Outfitters Inc (NYSE: AEO) withdrew full-year guidance.

news.summary: The inaugural M360 Eurasia event is scheduled to be held in Tashkent on May 21-22, 2025. This event in Uzbekistan signifies the region's dedication to digital advancements. The venue for the event is set to be the InterContinental hotel in Tashkent.
news.headline: GSMA M360 Eurasia conference in Tashkent on May 21-22, 2025, showcasing regional digital transformation.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, NS Pharma, Inc. disclosed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration has agreed to review the Biologics License Application filed by REGENXBIO Inc., a subsidiary of Nippon Shinyaku Co., Ltd. The submission has been accepted for examination following this announcement.
news.headline: FDA accepts BLA for Mucopolysaccharidosis II treatment by NS Pharma; U.S. FDA to review BLA submission by REGENXBIO Inc.

news.summary: Benitec Biopharma Inc. reported financial results for the third fiscal quarter ending March 31, 2025. Total expenses were $10.2 million, with $6.0 million in research and development expenses primarily for the clinical development of BB-301 for treating OPMD. General and administrative expenses were $4.2 million. The loss from operations was $10.2 million, and the net loss attributable to shareholders was $9.4 million, or $0.24 per basic and diluted share. The company had $103.6 million in cash and cash equivalents as of March 31, 2025. Total assets amounted to $105.2 million, with total liabilities of $7.6 million. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Benitec Biopharma reports Q3 2025 results: Total expenses $10.2M, R&D $6.0M, net loss $9.4M, cash $103.6M. OPMD treatment progress shared.

news.summary: Foghorn Therapeutics Inc. is actively progressing its FHD-909 (LY4050784) in Phase 1 clinical trials targeting SMARCA4 (BRG1) mutated cancers, primarily non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). The company presented data at AACR showing positive results in combination with pembrolizumab and KRAS inhibitors. As of March 31, 2025, the company had $220.6 million in cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities, providing funding until 2027. Foghorn is focused on novel oncology treatments and has outlined milestones for its programs. The company also made strategic board appointments and hosted its Chromatin Regulation Summit. In financial terms, collaboration revenue was $6.0 million for Q1 2025, with research and development expenses at $21.6 million. Overall, Foghorn is making notable progress in developing innovative therapies for various cancers, with a strong financial position supporting its growth.
news.headline: Foghorn Therapeutics announces financial update for Q1 2025 with $220.6 million cash, progresses FHD-909 Phase 1 trial targeting SMARCA4 mutated cancers, and presents data at AACR. Selective CBP degrader program on track for IND in 2026, with positive preclinical data presented. Selective EP300 degrader program shows promise in hematological malignancies, with program updates expected. Revenue at $6.0 million for Q1 2025, and R&D expenses at $21.6 million, down from previous year. Exciting advancements in cancer therapeutics.

news.summary: CalciMedica Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focusing on developing CRAC channel inhibition therapies for inflammatory and immunologic diseases. They reported their financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2025. The company has a cash position of $24.6 million, expected to fund operations until mid-2026. They are currently conducting Phase 2 trials for Auxora in acute kidney injury (AKI) and respiratory failure, with data expected by the end of 2025. In a recent post-hoc analysis, a subset of patients with AKI in the Phase 2 CARDEA trial showed a 62.7% relative reduction in mortality for Auxora compared to placebo. CalciMedica also plans to discuss Phase 3 program in acute pancreatitis with SIRS with the FDA. Key updates include a new addition to the Board of Directors and a credit facility of up to $32.5 million. Research and development expenses for the quarter were $4.2 million, indicating ongoing investment in clinical trials. Auxora has shown promising results in clinical trials, offering potential new treatments for critical illnesses.
news.headline: CalciMedica reported Q1 2025 results, ongoing trials for AKI & respiratory failure, expects data by end of 2025. Cash position at $24.6 million; R&D expenses $4.2 million, G&A expenses $2.3 million. Net loss for quarter: $5.0 million. Company focused on developing CRAC channel inhibition therapies for inflammatory diseases. Board addition, credit facility announced.

news.summary: NexLiving Communities Inc. reported positive financial results for the first quarter of 2025 in which they achieved a 110% year-over-year growth in Funds from Operations (FFO) reaching $1.7 million. Net Operating Income (NOI) saw a significant increase of 70% totaling $4.9 million for the same period. Occupancy improved to 97.4% by the end of March and the company showed a 2.1% increase in Same Property NOI. The President & CEO, Stavro Stathonikos, praised the team for their efforts in driving these strong results and successfully integrating over 1,000 acquired units in the past six months. Important numbers include 1,998 suites, 97.4% occupancy rate, and a net asset value of $140,180,478 as of March 31, 2025. These results reflect the company's strategy of expanding in secondary markets with high-quality assets.
news.headline: NexLiving reported record Q1 performance with a 110% FFO growth to $1.7M and 70% NOI growth to $4.9M. Occupancy improved to 97.4%.

news.summary: Tower Semiconductor reported a 9% year-over-year revenue growth in the first quarter of 2025, with revenues totaling $358 million compared to $327 million in the first quarter of 2024. Gross profit was $73 million, and operating profit was $33 million for Q1 2025. Net profit for Q1 2025 was $40 million. Tower Semiconductor affirmed its sequential quarterly revenue growth target for 2025 and expects revenues of $372 million for Q2 2025. The company's corporate credit rating was reaffirmed as "ilAA" with a stable outlook. Tower Semiconductor's CEO mentioned a focus on revenue growth in RF infrastructure and other technologies. The company is also expanding into new markets like envelope trackers. Tower Semiconductor offers analog semiconductor solutions in markets like consumer, automotive, and aerospace. More detailed financial information is available in the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Tower Semiconductor reported $358 million revenue in Q1 2025, a 9% YoY growth. Cash flow was $94 million with sequential quarterly revenue growth affirmed for 2025. Tower guides Q2 2025 revenue at $372 million, targeting a 6% YoY increase. The company reiterated its focus on revenue growth in various technology segments, aiming to enter new markets like envelope trackers. Corporate credit rating affirmed as "ilAA" with a stable outlook. Tower Semiconductor operates globally, providing high-value analog semiconductor solutions. Contact for investor relations: Liat Avraham +972-4-6506154 liatavra@towersemi.com. Comprehensive financial details in original article.

news.summary: Centessa Pharmaceuticals plc is making advancements in developing a potential best-in-class orexin receptor 2 (OX2R) agonist franchise. ORX750, a Phase 2a drug for narcolepsy type 1 (NT1), narcolepsy type 2 (NT2), and idiopathic hypersomnia (IH), is on track with data expected this year. The company also plans to initiate first-in-human studies of ORX142 for neurological and neurodegenerative disorders. ORX 489 is progressing in IND-enabling studies for neuropsychiatric disorders. Financially, Centessa reported $424.9 million in cash, cash equivalents, and investments as of March 31, 2025, with a net loss of $26.1 million for the first quarter. The Phase 2a CRYSTAL-1 study for ORX750 is evaluating safety, tolerability, and pharmacokinetics in participants, with data expected across all three indications in 2025. Centessa aims to deliver transformational medicines for patients with neurological, neurodegenerative, and neuropsychiatric disorders.
news.headline: Centessa Pharmaceuticals reported $424.9M in cash reserves, $33.4M R&D expenses, and a net loss of $26.1M in Q1 2025. Agonist pipeline advancing, with ORX750 Phase 2a study progressing. CEO optimistic about transformative year. Orexin pathway showing potential in various disorders.

news.summary: Franklin Street Properties Corp. disclosed plans for a strategic review to enhance shareholder value. The Board of Directors, listed on NYSE American as FSP, aims to explore various avenues such as selling the company or its assets, and refinancing current debt to optimize returns for shareholders. This initiative comes as part of efforts to maximize value for investors.
news.headline: Franklin Street Properties Corp (NYSE: FSP) to explore strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value, including possible sale or asset sale.

news.summary: In Grapevine, Texas, Southland Holdings, Inc. revealed the appointment of Donald Graul as the Chief Strategy Officer. Graul, who brings a wealth of experience from executive positions at AECOM, Parsons, and as the former CEO of The Branch Group, has vast expertise in infrastructure construction and engineering. He has contributed to major global infrastructure projects, collectively valued at more than $60 billion. Southland is listed on NYSE American under tickers SLND and SLND WS.
news.headline: Southland Holdings appoints Donald Graul as Chief Strategy Officer, known for $60 billion in infrastructure projects.

news.summary: KP Tissue Inc. (KPT) reported the Q1 2025 financial results of both KPT and Kruger Products Inc., Canada's prominent tissue manufacturer. Kruger Products' Q1 2025 revenue was $546.1 million, a 13.9% increase from Q1 2024, with adjusted EBITDA at $75.8 million and net income at $15.4 million. KPT had a 12.3% interest in Kruger Products. KPT's Q1 2025 net income was $1.7 million, with a declared quarterly dividend of $0.18 per share to be paid on July 15, 2025. KP Tissue's CEO, Dino Bianco, noted strong results driven by increased sales volumes in Canada and the U.S. The company expects Q2 2025 Adjusted EBITDA to be $70-75 million. Overall, Kruger Products continues to expand its market presence, particularly in the U.S., and is closely monitoring potential tariff impacts.
news.headline: KP Tissue reports Q1 2025 results: Revenue $546.1M, EBITDA $75.8M, net income $15.4M. 12.3% interest in Kruger Products.

news.summary: United Homes Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UHG) based in Columbia, S.C., reported its first-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The company disclosed that their net income for the quarter was $18.2 million, translating to $0.31 per diluted share. The reported figures included $21.2 million income related to the change in fair value of derivative liabilities. This change was primarily driven by fluctuations in the fair value of potential earn-out consideration.
news.headline: United Homes Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UHG) reports Q1 2025 results: net income $18.2 million, $0.31 per share.

news.summary: As the president embarks on a trip to the Middle East, the control of A.I. chips by America has emerged as a significant strategic advantage. The superiority in A.I. chip technology has become a crucial tool for the president, highlighting the nation's dominance in this sector. This advantage provides a strong leverage in negotiations and interactions with other countries, showcasing America's prowess in cutting-edge technology.
news.headline: Trump leverages America's dominant position in A.I. chips for deal-making as he heads to the Middle East.

news.summary: The company announced that Mr. Witty departed from his position due to personal reasons. Stephen Hemsley, the executive chairman of the company, will take over his role.
news.headline: UnitedHealth Group C.E.O. Andrew Witty steps down for personal reasons. Executive chairman Stephen Hemsley to take over.

news.summary: Investigators using blockchain technology have traced the laundering of cartel drug profits through cryptocurrency, leading to an indictment.
news.headline: Cartel leaders face narco-terrorism charges linked to crypto laundering as blockchain experts track drug money flow.

news.summary: Smith Douglas Homes Corp. (NYSE: SDHC) revealed their Q1 2025 results, comparing them to Q1 2024. Home closings surged by 19% to reach 671, while home closing revenue rose by the same percentage to $224.7 million. The home closing gross margin stood at 23.8% compared to 26.1%. The company received 768 net new home orders, just slightly above the 765 from the prior year. Their pretax income dropped to $19.6 million from $21.4 million. Earnings amounted to $0.30 per diluted share.
news.headline: Smith Douglas Homes (NYSE: SDHC) reported Q1 2025 results: 19% increase in home closings to 671, revenue $224.7M, pretax income $19.6M, earnings per share $0.30.

news.summary: Endava and AlixPartners have joined forces in a strategic partnership to provide end-to-end technology-driven solutions for clients worldwide. Endava, listed on NYSE as DAVA, specializes in business transformation by combining advanced technology with industry knowledge. Meanwhile, AlixPartners is a global consulting firm known for its expertise in delivering innovative solutions. This partnership aims to leverage their respective strengths to accelerate digital transformation. This collaboration promises to bring cutting-edge technology to clients, offering comprehensive solutions to meet their needs on a global scale.
news.headline: Endava (NYSE:DAVA) and AlixPartners partner for digital solutions, aiming to accelerate transformation globally.

news.summary: Marketpoint Recall has introduced a new solution called ‘Recall Ready’ to assist brands in managing and responding to recalls more effectively. The service aims to aid brands in regaining control, reacting promptly, improving communication, and rebounding stronger in the event of a recall. Failure to handle recalls efficiently can lead to significant costs such as delays in customer outreach, discord in communication channels, regulatory issues, and diminished trust. The 'Recall Ready' service is accessible in both the UK and the US, helping to streamline processes, minimize expenses, mitigate legal risks, and enhance brand resilience during recall situations.
news.headline: Marketpoint Recall has launched 'Recall Ready' to cut product recall costs by 50%. Helps brands respond faster, communicate better, and recover stronger. Available in UK and America.

news.summary: Karmanos Cancer Institute's clinical and basic scientists recently shared insights on cancer advancements and ongoing research with residents statewide. In Detroit on May 14, 2025, the Barbara Ann Karmanos Cancer Institute's Office of Community Outreach and Engagement (COE) collaborated with Detroit residents.
news.headline: Karmanos Cancer Institute and Detroit Public Library partner to educate community on cancer. Scientists share recent developments. May 14, 2025.

news.summary: Charlotte's Web Holdings, Inc., a company specializing in botanical wellness innovations, recently reported their quarterly results, indicating positive progress in their transformation strategy. The announcement was made on May 14, 2025, and the company's stock is listed on the TSX under the symbol CWEB and on the OTCQX under the symbol CWBHF. This news showcases the company's successful efforts in implementing their strategic plan.
news.headline: Charlotte's Web (TSX: CWEB) reported year-over-year growth in Q1 2025, showcasing successful transformation strategy.

news.summary: In Vaughan, Ontario, Bausch + Lomb Corporation have introduced the U.S. launch of Zenlens CHROMA HOA scleral contact lenses. This eyecare company (NYSE/TSX: BLCO) focuses on aiding individuals with better vision to improve their quality of life. The innovative lenses are crafted to address complex higher-order aberrations (HOA), offering a solution to issues like halos and glare. By incorporating custom, wavefront-guided technology, these scleral lenses promise improved vision quality.
news.headline: Bausch + Lomb launches Zenlens CHROMA HOA in the U.S, a scleral lens to correct HOA. Stock: BLCO (NYSE/TSX).

news.summary: A new company called Kovr.ai has recently come out of stealth mode, securing $3.6 million in funding. The company aims to revolutionize cyber compliance automation specifically for organizations operating in heavily regulated sectors.
news.headline: Kovr.ai exits stealth with $3.6M to innovate cyber compliance automation for highly regulated sectors.

news.summary: A defense software company, TurbineOne, based in San Francisco, has declared a successful $36 million Series B funding round today. The funding, led by The General Partnership and joined by Bessemer Venture Partners, XYZ Ventures, Stepstone Group, and PROOF VC, has placed the company's valuation at $300 million. TurbineOne specializes in real-time threat detection and decision-making at the tactical edge, offering software that operates on battlefield sensors autonomously without the need for cloud connectivity.
news.headline: TurbineOne secures $36M Series B funding led by The General Partnership, valuing the company at $300M, for AI deployment in defense.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached an all-time low of 3.8%. This significant decrease in unemployment is attributed to the creation of over 200,000 new jobs in the past month, exceeding economists' expectations. The job market appears to be thriving, with industries such as technology, healthcare, and hospitality experiencing substantial growth. Additionally, wages have seen a 3.2% increase from the previous year, indicating positive economic momentum. Overall, the current job landscape is showing promising signs of strength and stability.
news.headline: Upstart will hold its inaugural 'AI Day' for investors today on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Aeva® (Nasdaq: AEVA) has revealed a strategic partnership with a tech-affiliate of a Global Fortune 500 firm, a major global tech solutions provider. The collaboration aims to introduce Aeva’s advanced 4D LiDAR technology into fresh industrial and consumer sectors. Additionally, Aeva has chosen the firm as its Tier-2 manufacturing partner for the Top 10 passenger OEM program.
news.headline: Aeva partners with Global Fortune 500 affiliate for LiDAR expansion, Tier-2 manufacturer for passenger OEM program.

news.summary: In Morrisville, North Carolina, a recent report by Lenovo highlights the significance of embracing Generative AI (Gen AI) in reshaping work processes. The study, which surveyed 600 IT leaders globally, indicates that despite 80% acknowledging the transformative potential of Gen AI, merely 39% have initiated substantial steps towards leveraging it. The results emphasize the risk companies face in lagging behind by delaying the modernization of their digital workplaces. This underscores the urgent need for organizations to prioritize adopting Gen AI to stay competitive in the evolving business landscape.
news.headline: Lenovo's report warns that delaying digital workplace transformation can be detrimental. 80% see Gen AI reshaping work, but only 39% act on it.

news.summary: NeuReality, an AI inferencing architecture innovator based in CAESAREA, Israel, unveiled that its NR1 Inference Appliance now features pre-installed enterprise AI models such as Llama, Mistral, Qwen, and Granite1. In addition, it offers compatibility with private generative AI clouds and on-premise clusters. The appliance guarantees rapid deployment, with setup taking less than 30 minutes. It promises 3 times faster time-to-value compared to alternatives, enabling customers to swiftly utilize generative and agentic AI capabilities.
news.headline: NeuReality's NR1 Inference Appliance comes preloaded with popular AI models and delivers 3x better time-to-value.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, TensorWave, a prominent provider of AI infrastructure solutions powered by AMD, disclosed raising an impressive $100 million in Series A funding. Leading the round were Magnetar and AMD Ventures, alongside ongoing backers Maverick Silicon and Nexus Venture Partners, with new investor Prosperity7 also contributing. This funding, following a prior SAFE round, aims to propel TensorWave to leverage the increasing need for advanced AI compute infrastructure. The investment underscores TensorWave's strong positioning in the market.
news.headline: TensorWave raises $100M in Series A led by Magnetar and AMD Ventures, set to boost AI infrastructure.

news.summary: In Watertown, Massachusetts, Konovo has announced the appointment of Gadi Lachman to its board of directors. This strategic decision aims to drive the company's efforts in revolutionizing market insights within the life science sector through AI technology.
news.headline: Konovo appoints Gadi Lachman to its board, focusing on life science market insights transformation. #AIEnabled

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, WELL Health Technologies Corp. (TSX: WELL, OTCQX: WHTCF) has revealed its interim financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company, dedicated to enhancing health outcomes through digital healthcare innovations, is led by Chairman and CEO Hamed Shahbazi. The report marks a promising beginning for WELL, showcasing positive growth.
news.headline: WELL Health reports record revenue in Q1-2025, 32% YoY growth, and record quarterly EBITDA in Canadian business.
CHINA-EU FINANCIAL WORKING GROUP MEETING HELD IN BRUSSELS discussed everything
